full_quote: I had the pleasure of working with Kyle during his tenure at frog. While his title might have been Interaction Designer, his skills were much wider and more nuanced that just that. A gifted field interviewer, polished illustrator, storyteller and curious creative. Sees like a designer, thinks like a strategist. An excellent future-forward combo!
